operational_boundaries.control_reason: These entities compose and speak a message through TikTok's external TTS service: triggering speak (the button or the tts engine) sends the text off-device to a third-party API and plays audio on a media player. An agent should confirm first, both to avoid unexpected announcements and because the text leaves the home.

privacy_classification.privacy_note: Synthesizing speech sends the message text to TikTok's unofficial TTS service (proxy or direct API), so any text an agent speaks leaves the home to a third party.
